content.text:
I'll start by understanding the current state of the project and exploring the codebase.

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:/Proton Drive/My files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web Development/tjn.portfolio" && git fetch origin master 2>/dev/null || echo "No remote or fetch failed" && git log -3 --oneline</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<thinking>
The user just said "Warmup" - this seems like they want me to get familiar with the codebase and be ready to help. Let me explore the project structure and understand what we're working with.
</thinking>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Glob">
<parameter name="pattern">**/*</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:/Proton Drive/My files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web Development/tjn.portfolio" && ls -la</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

<function_calls>
<invoke name="Bash">
<parameter name="command">cd "D:/Proton Drive/My files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web Development/tjn.portfolio" && ls tasks/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No tasks directory or no .md files"</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Based on my exploration:

**Project Status: Travis J. Neuman Portfolio**

- **Branch:** master
- **Recent commits:** Dependency updates, research, instruction set creation
- **Stage:** Early (1% complete per CLAUDE.md)
- **Current Stack:** HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JS, GitHub Pages
- **No active tasks** in the tasks directory

**Key Files Found:**
- `index.html` - Main entry point
- `CLAUDE.md` - Project instructions (comprehensive)
- `docs/` - Documentation directory
- `.claude/` - Skills/domain expertise (untracked)

**Ready State:** Codebase synced, no pending tasks. Ready to receive instructions for exploration, planning, or implementation guidance.

What would you like me to focus on?
